subject: Fermi  trigger No 749693019: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E. Gorbovskoy, K. Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, V.Senik,  D. Vlasenko,
G.Antipov, D.Zimnukhov, E.Minkina, A.Chasovnikov, V.Topolev, D.Kuvshinov, D. Cheryasov, Ya.Kechin, Yu.Tselik, A. Sosnovskij

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)

MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB241004.00 (trigger No 749693019,09h 03m 52.08s , -62d 37m 01.2s, R=50) errorbox  15 sec after notice time and 48 sec after trigger time at 2024-10-04 00:04:22 UT, with upper limit up to  19.0 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 48 deg. The sun  altitude  is -47.0 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -10 deg., longitude l = 280 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2624424

We obtain a following upper limits.
